name: slopnought
description: Code maintainability skill — makes generated code understandable, extensible, testable, secure, and maintainable. Includes code generation mode, codebase refactoring/audit mode, architecture decision records, and anti-pattern prevention.
author: Bhumit Chaudhry
skillInstructions:
When slopnought skill references tools, use these Kimi Code equivalents:
- Read a file → Read
- Edit a file → Edit
- Run a shell command → Bash
- Search files by content → Grep
- Search files by name → Glob
- Create/update todos → TodoList
- Dispatch a subagent → Agent
- Fetch a URL → FetchURL
- Ask user a question → AskUserQuestion
- Invoke a skill → Skill
